SEARCH

Uses of Package
discount

Packages that use discount
Package
Description
discount
It includes all the methods and classes necessary to apply and create discounts.
notification
This package contains everything related to the notifications of the store.
product
It includes everything product-unique.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.
user
It contains everything related to the different users of the store.
  • Classes in discount used by discount
    Class
    Description
    CategoryDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Category coverage
    Discount
    It implements the general discount
    DiscountCoverage
    It defines the discount coverages
    DiscountFactory
    It defines the base discount constructors (without specific coverage)
    DiscountType
    It defines the discount types
    FixedPercentageDiscount
    It defines the base Fixed Percentage discount's methods
    GiftDiscount
    It defines the base Gift discount's methods
    PackDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Pack coverage
    ProductDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Product coverage
    ProductFixedPercentage
    It implements the Product discount whose type is FixedPercentage
    ProductGift
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Gift
    ProductQuantity
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Quantity
    ProductVolume
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Volume
    QuantityDiscount
    It defines the base Quantity discount's methods
    VolumeDiscount
    It defines the base Volume discount's methods
  • Classes in discount used by notification
    Class
    Description
    Discount
    It implements the general discount
  • Classes in discount used by product
    Class
    Description
    Discount
    It implements the general discount
  • Classes in discount used by store
    Class
    Description
    Discount
    It implements the general discount

    Class
    Description
    FixedPercentageDiscount
    It defines the base Fixed Percentage discount's methods
    GiftDiscount
    It defines the base Gift discount's methods
    ProductFixedPercentage
    It implements the Product discount whose type is FixedPercentage
    ProductGift
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Gift
    ProductQuantity
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Quantity
    ProductVolume
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Volume
    QuantityDiscount
    It defines the base Quantity discount's methods
    VolumeDiscount
